filing.declarations: SPT Masa monthly + SPT Tahunan annual

business_description: PT on UMKM final PPh 0.5%. Spa & wellness salon in Seminyak; 6 employees on payroll (PPh 21 + BPJS Kesehatan & Ketenagakerjaan); premises rented (monthly PPh 4(2) on rent). Full PT monthly cycle + annual SPT Tahunan Badan & LKPM.

client_facing.summary: Indonesian PT on the UMKM final-tax regime (PPh 0.5% of turnover), a spa & wellness salon in Bali, operating since 2024.
